If.name: If
If.description: Executes one of two execution outputs based on the value of the input condition. If the condition is true, the top execution output will be used, and if the condition is false, the bottom execution output will be used.

inputs.name: Run
inputs.description: The execution input to trigger the condition check

outputs.name: True
outputs.description: The execution output if the condition is true

outputs.name: False
outputs.description: The execution output if the condition is false
